# Alice Smith

Alice Smith is a principal engineer at Acme Corp with deep expertise in distributed systems and search infrastructure. She leads the platform team responsible for the core indexing and retrieval pipeline.

## Background

Alice joined Acme Corp in 2022 after spending five years at a large cloud provider working on full-text search services. Her experience includes designing high-throughput ingestion pipelines, optimising BM25 ranking functions, and building fault-tolerant distributed storage systems.

## Current Focus

Alice is currently leading the effort to integrate a hybrid search pipeline that combines traditional BM25 scoring with vector similarity search. She is also mentoring two junior engineers on the team and contributing to the architecture decision record process.

## Key Contributions

- Designed the original FTS5 indexing strategy used across all document collections
- Led the migration from a monolithic search service to a modular pipeline architecture
- Authored ADR-016 on dual-corpus architecture for reference library and user knowledge stores
